headline: Analog Devices (ADI) Could Be 16% Undervalued As It Secures A $3.0b Credit Facility
summary: Analog Devices (ADI) has secured a new 364 day revolving credit facility of up to US$3.0b. This adds flexible funding capacity that could influence how you think about the stock’s balance sheet and capital allocation. See our latest analysis for Analog Devices. Recent trading has cooled after a strong run, with Analog Devices’ share price down 2.52% over the last session and 5.57% over 30 days. At the same time, the 90 day share price return of 9.48% and 1 year total shareholder return of...

headline: Strong Growth Fueled Analog Devices (ADI) in Q1
summary: Artisan Partners, an investment management firm, issued its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Artisan Mid Cap Value Fund”. A copy of this letter is available for download here. In Q1 2026, the portfolio underperformed the benchmark Russell Midcap Value Index as the market favored momentum-driven stocks over quality factors.
